info.title: Selah API
info.description: This API provides access to application resources and operations.

get.description: Confirms the API process is up and able to respond to requests. This does not verify downstream dependencies (database, SMTP, etc.) so a 200 here does not guarantee those are reachable.

status.description: HTTP status code, duplicated from the response status.

message.description: Human-readable summary of the health check result.

500.description: Internal server error. Something went wrong.

example.message: Internal server error. Something went wrong.

post.description: Admin-only. Generates an invitation link (valid for 2 hours) and emails it to the given address.

get.summary: Look up an invitation by token
get.description: Public. Used by the sign-up page to check whether a token is still valid before showing the form.

404.description: Not found. Resource does not exist.

example.message: Not found. Resource does not exist.

post.description: Admin-only. Creates a new lineup, optionally with an initial set list and roster, all in one transaction.

get.description: Any authenticated user can list lineups, newest first, each with its team, devo leader, set list, and roster - optionally filtered by a spelling-tolerant `q` search over the series name and topic, a `from`/`to` service-date range, and/or `status` (comma-separated). Pass `sort` (`asc`/`desc`) to order by service date instead.

schema.description: Spelling-tolerant search over the series name and topic.

parameters.description: Spelling-tolerant search over the series name and topic.
parameters.name: q

schema.description: Only lineups on/after this service date (YYYY-MM-DD), inclusive. Given without `to`, filters to every lineup from this date on.

parameters.description: Only lineups on/after this service date (YYYY-MM-DD), inclusive. Given without `to`, filters to every lineup from this date on.
parameters.name: from

schema.description: Only lineups on/before this service date (YYYY-MM-DD), inclusive.

parameters.description: Only lineups on/before this service date (YYYY-MM-DD), inclusive.
parameters.name: to

schema.description: Comma-separated statuses (draft, pending, approved) - only lineups in one of these.

parameters.description: Comma-separated statuses (draft, pending, approved) - only lineups in one of these.
parameters.name: status

schema.description: Order by service date: `asc` (soonest first) or `desc` (latest first). Omit to keep the default order (newest-created first, or search-relevance order when `q` is given).

parameters.description: Order by service date: `asc` (soonest first) or `desc` (latest first). Omit to keep the default order (newest-created first, or search-relevance order when `q` is given).
parameters.name: sort

get.description: Any authenticated user can fetch a single lineup, with its team, devo leader, set list, and roster.

404.description: Not found. Resource does not exist.

example.message: Not found. Resource does not exist.

patch.description: Admin-only. Updates a lineup's status, team assignment, series/topic, word, and/or direction. Use the songs/members endpoints to change the set list or roster.

404.description: Not found. Resource does not exist.

example.message: Not found. Resource does not exist.

delete.description: Admin-only. Deletes a lineup along with its set list, roster, schedule slots, and discussion.

404.description: Not found. Resource does not exist.

example.message: Not found. Resource does not exist.

post.summary: Add a song to a lineup
post.description: Admin-only. Appends a song to the lineup's set list. Idempotent - adding a song already in the set list is a no-op. Returns the full, updated lineup.

404.description: Not found. Resource does not exist.

example.message: Not found. Resource does not exist.

delete.summary: Remove a song from a lineup
delete.description: Admin-only. Removes a song from the lineup's set list.

404.description: Not found. Resource does not exist.

example.message: Not found. Resource does not exist.

patch.summary: Assign or clear a song's singer
patch.description: Admin-only. Updates who's singing a song already in the lineup's set list. Returns the full, updated lineup.

404.description: Not found. Resource does not exist.

example.message: Not found. Resource does not exist.

put.description: Admin-only. Reorders every song already in the lineup's set list to match the given order. Returns the full, updated lineup.

404.description: Not found. Resource does not exist.

example.message: Not found. Resource does not exist.

post.summary: Add a user to a lineup's roster
post.description: Admin-only. Adds a user to the lineup's roster - independent of team membership, and either from the assigned team or from outside it. Their displayed instruments are resolved from their global musician profile, not set here. Idempotent - adding a user already on the roster is a no-op. Returns the full, updated lineup.

404.description: Not found. Resource does not exist.

example.message: Not found. Resource does not exist.

delete.summary: Remove a user from a lineup's roster
delete.description: Admin-only. Removes a single roster assignment.

404.description: Not found. Resource does not exist.

example.message: Not found. Resource does not exist.

get.description: Any authenticated user can view a lineup's discussion - top-level comments with one level of nested replies, each with per-emoji reaction counts and whether the requesting user has reacted.

404.description: Not found. Resource does not exist.

example.message: Not found. Resource does not exist.

post.summary: Post a comment or reply on a lineup
post.description: Any authenticated user can post a top-level comment, or reply to an existing top-level comment.

404.description: Not found. Resource does not exist.

example.message: Not found. Resource does not exist.

post.summary: Toggle a reaction on a comment
post.description: Any authenticated user can react to a comment - reacting with the same emoji again removes it. Returns the comment's updated per-emoji reaction summary.

404.description: Not found. Resource does not exist.

example.message: Not found. Resource does not exist.

patch.description: Only the comment's own author can edit it.

404.description: Not found. Resource does not exist.

example.message: Not found. Resource does not exist.

delete.description: Only the comment's own author can delete it. Deleting a top-level comment also deletes its replies.

404.description: Not found. Resource does not exist.

example.message: Not found. Resource does not exist.

post.description: Admin-only. Creates a global musician profile for a user, with an optional initial set of instruments. A user can only have one profile.

get.description: Any authenticated user can list every musician profile, alphabetically by name - used to populate the team member picker, among other places.

get.summary: Get a musician profile by id
get.description: Any authenticated user can fetch a single musician profile.

404.description: Not found. Resource does not exist.

example.message: Not found. Resource does not exist.

patch.description: Admin-only. Replaces a musician's full set of instruments.

404.description: Not found. Resource does not exist.

example.message: Not found. Resource does not exist.

delete.description: Admin-only. Deletes a musician's profile - refused (409) while they're still a member of any team, since team membership requires a musician profile; remove them from every team first.

404.description: Not found. Resource does not exist.

example.message: Not found. Resource does not exist.

get.description: Any authenticated user can list every schedule entry, ordered by when it happens, each joined with its lineup (if any).

post.description: Any authenticated user can request a song's audio be separated into vocals, drums, bass, guitar, piano, and other instruments (via a self-hosted Demucs worker). Requesting again - whether already in progress, previously failed, or already completed - restarts the job and replaces any existing result.

404.description: Not found. Resource does not exist.

example.message: Not found. Resource does not exist.

get.summary: Get a song's stem separation status
get.description: Any authenticated user can check the status of a song's stem separation job, and get short-lived signed playback URLs for its 6 stems once it has completed.

404.description: Not found. Resource does not exist.

example.message: Not found. Resource does not exist.

post.summary: Worker callback: report a stem separation job's outcome
post.description: Called by the stem separation worker, not an end user, once a job finishes - either with the 6 uploaded stem storage keys, or an error message. Authenticated with a shared secret rather than a user session.

404.description: Not found. Resource does not exist.

example.message: Not found. Resource does not exist.

post.description: Any authenticated user can upload a song's audio file and basic metadata.

413.description: Payload too large. Request body exceeds the maximum allowed size.

example.message: Payload too large. Request body exceeds the maximum allowed size.

get.description: Any authenticated user can list uploaded songs, paginated via `cursor`/`limit` and optionally filtered with a spelling-tolerant search over title and artist via the `q` query param.

schema.description: Spelling-tolerant search over song title and artist.

parameters.description: Spelling-tolerant search over song title and artist.
parameters.name: q

schema.description: Offset-based pagination cursor - pass back the previous response's `nextCursor`.

parameters.description: Offset-based pagination cursor - pass back the previous response's `nextCursor`.
parameters.name: cursor

schema.description: Max songs to return per page.

parameters.description: Max songs to return per page.
parameters.name: limit

get.description: Any authenticated user can fetch a single song's metadata by id.

404.description: Not found. Resource does not exist.

example.message: Not found. Resource does not exist.

patch.summary: Update a song's chord sheet, musical key, or tempo
patch.description: Any authenticated user can update a song's chord-over-lyric sheet, musical key, and/or tempo. All fields are optional - only the ones provided are changed.

404.description: Not found. Resource does not exist.

example.message: Not found. Resource does not exist.

delete.description: Admin-only. Deletes the song's database record and its audio file and album art (if any) from storage.

404.description: Not found. Resource does not exist.

example.message: Not found. Resource does not exist.

get.summary: Get a temporary playback URL for a song
get.description: Any authenticated user can request a short-lived, signed URL for streaming a song's audio file directly from storage.

404.description: Not found. Resource does not exist.

example.message: Not found. Resource does not exist.

get.summary: Get a temporary download URL for a song
get.description: Any authenticated user can request a short-lived, signed URL for downloading a song's original audio file.

404.description: Not found. Resource does not exist.

example.message: Not found. Resource does not exist.

get.summary: Get a temporary URL for a song's album art
get.description: Any authenticated user can request a short-lived, signed URL for a song's album art image, if one was uploaded.

404.description: Not found. Resource does not exist.

example.message: Not found. Resource does not exist.

post.description: Admin-only. Creates a new team, optionally with an initial roster, all in one transaction.

get.description: Any authenticated user can list every team, alphabetically by name, each with its members and their current instruments.
Any authenticated user can fetch a single team, with its members and their current instruments.

post.summary: Add a member to a team
post.description: Admin-only. Adds an existing musician to a team. Idempotent - adding an existing member is a no-op. Returns the full, updated team.

delete.description: Admin-only. Removes a member from a team - their musician profile is untouched.

get.description: Admin-only. Lists every user, alphabetically by name - used to populate the musician and team-leader pickers when creating or editing a team.
